client_identities_contact_check.name: client_identities_contact_check
client_identities_contact_check.value: "client_identities"."email" is not null or "client_identities"."phone_e164" is not null

client_identities_email_verified_check.value: "client_identities"."email" is null or "client_identities"."verified_email_at" is not null

client_identities_phone_verified_check.value: "client_identities"."phone_e164" is null or "client_identities"."verified_phone_at" is not null

pending_decisions_pending_record_unique_.name: pending_decisions_pending_record_unique_idx
